# People Analytics

Certificate Program

Start using data to drive better, fact-based people decisions that ultimately benefit both the organization and its employees. As a People Analytics Specialist, you have a full analytics skillset that will enable you to drive data-driven decision-making throughout HR.

DOWNLOAD SYLLABUS

ENROLL NOW

What members say about this program:

Practical approach to understanding and applying HR analytics principles

Real-world examples, expert instructors, and flexible online format

The PowerBI and Excel reporting and dashboarding were excellent

Trusted by 85,000+ 
HR professionals

## What you will learn

Learn how HR Analytics can be used to drive business value

Get hands-on by analyzing people data in Excel

Build interactive HR dashboards and reports in Microsoft PowerBI

Earn your certificate with the capstone project by completing a real-world case

### Why AIHR?

✓ Globally accredited & recognized (SHRM, HRCI, more…)

✓ Join 85,000+ members worldwide

✓ Future-focused and human-centric

✓ All the tools you need to level up your career

Read our 12470 reviews

## Program structure

Watch program overview video

43.3 hours of learning

People Analytics Foundations

1 module

• 4 lessons

• 2 hours

Replace gut feeling with data-driven decisions in HR

Help your business and employees thrive with evidence-backed HR policies. In this People Analytics Foundations course, you will learn how people analytics can add value to both HR and the organization through 5 real-life case studies. These case studies, taken from companies in different industries, will highlight how you can use data to solve pressing business problems and increase HR's strategic impact.

MODULE #1

People Analytics Foundations

Lesson 1 – What Is People Analytics?

Lesson 2 – Five People Analytics Use Cases

PREVIEW NOW

Lesson 3 – The People Analytics Cycle

Lesson 4 – The Role of the Data Analyst

Erik van Vulpen

People Analytics & Digital HR Leader

HR Data Analyst

4 modules

• 8 lessons

• 6 hours

Expand your HR toolkit with practical HR analyst skills

Get hands-on experience analyzing data, uncovering critical business insights, and creating dynamic data visualizations that spur stakeholders into action. This HR Data Analyst course equips you with the analytics skills needed to solve real HR problems through a series of practical case studies.

AI Tutorials for People Analytics

2 modules

• 11 lessons

• 4 hours

Master generative AI data analytics

AI Tutorials for People Analytics focuses on two key HR analytics use cases: employee feedback analysis and workforce planning. Through short, hands-on demos, you’ll learn how to use generative AI as a research assistant across qualitative and quantitative people data, while keeping interpretation, ethics, and accountability firmly in human hands. You’ll be able to use AI in people analytics to clean data, surface patterns, model workforce scenarios, and draft insights summaries.

MODULE #1

Analyzing Employee Feedback with AI

Lesson 1 — How to Use AI as a Research Assistant

Safe AI Use for Qualitative Analysis Checklist

• 22 lessons

• 6 hours

Enhance your data analytics capability with Power BI

Learn how to transform large amounts of data into intelligent, actionable insights. Master the foundation of Power BI by working through a practical use case including a unique, provided data set that gives you hands-on experience with HR data visualization, interactive reports, and advanced HR dashboards with permission levels to manage stakeholder access

HR Statistics in Excel

5 modules

• 13 lessons

• 15 hours

HR statistical analysis for actionable people insights

To accurately interpret HR data insights and provide meaningful recommendations, you will need to understand core statistical concepts like significance and probability. Through practical activities in this HR Statistics in Excel course, you will learn how to run the right statistical analyses to make sound decisions even when faced with limited data and uncertainty.

MODULE #1

Statistical Analysis 101

Lesson 1 – Beyond Descriptive People Analytics

Lesson 2 – Understanding Hypothesis Testing

Lesson 3 – Choosing the Right Statistical Test

Capstone Project

Exam + Project

• 1.5 hours

In the capstone project, you will put your newly acquired People Analytics expertise into practice. In this interactive project, you will find yourself in the role of an HR analyst asked to answer a series of business questions by performing a descriptive analysis, building a report in Power BI, and testing hypotheses.

You need to pass the capstone project to earn your certificate!

You can retry the capstone project and exam as often as you like.

All materials needed to complete the project will be provided.

Explore the full curriculum in pdf and **receive email reminders** when enrollment opens

DOWNLOAD SYLLABUS

## KEY PROJECTS & RESOURCES IN THIS PROGRAM

Interactive Case Study: Employee Turnover

Get hands-on by analyzing employee turnover in Excel.

Data Cleaning Checklist

Ensure the validity of your analysis by using this checklist

Safe AI Use for Qualitative Analysis Checklist

Understand the 3 zones for using AI responsibly when analyzing employee feedback: permitted, restricted, or prohibited.

Activity: Which Factors Lead to Attrition?

Use an LLM to validate the dataset’s structure, key variables, and quality risks.

Interactive Case Study: People Dashboards in Power BI

Get hands-on by creating an absenteeism report in Power BI

Power BI Best Practices Guide

Get access to tips and best practices for creating Power BI reports

People Analytics Glossary

Your one-stop-shop to key statistical terms and concepts

Excel Cheat Sheet

Get access to tips, shortcuts, and refreshers for simple Excel functions

Get free access to our Demo Portal and experience AIHR as a member

Preview selected lessons, resources, guides, and templates, interact with our HR-trained AI assistant, and explore even more!

## What AIHR Members & Teams get

### Certification and Accreditation

AIHR is a registered education institute on LinkedIn and a recertification provider with global HR associations. Earn your AIHR certificaiton while earning recertification credits through courses and live events.

Upon completion of the program, you will receive a digital certificate to showcase in the education section of your LinkedIn profile.

Preview your certificate

### HR Resource Library

Never start from scratch and save time by using off-the-shelf templates, playbooks, and tools from the resource library. 
Preview the Resource Library

### Weekly webinars with HR experts

Stay up-to-date with the latest HR trends and innovations by joining regular live events with Subject Matter Experts – and get SHRM & HRCI credits while you’re at it. 
Preview live events for members

### Worldwide HR Community

Join a worldwide HR community – get answers to your pressing questions from experts and challenge your peers in engaging discussions. 
Learn more in platform demo

### Mini courses

Learn more in less time with bite-sized knowledge for busy minds. Get comfortable with a new topic in just 10 minutes. 
Preview course lessons

### AIHR Copilot

Trained on AIHR’s 1000+ articles, 500+ hours of video lessons, and 100+ downloadable resources, the AIHR Copilot puts reliable HR answers at your fingertips. Get quick answers, expert advice, practical resources, and actionable material to get the job done. 
Try out Copilot in platform demo

**Included in Full Access and Team Plans.** Learning coaches act as your personal learning rocket fuel by providing the support and accountability you need to progress.

## FAQs

Need help making the right choice? Speak with an admissions advisor or send them a message.

### Why should I enroll in this People Analytics Certification Program?

Today's business landscape is dynamic and challenging, making data-driven decision-making a crucial advantage for organizations. This Certificate Program helps you develop sought-after People Analytics skills, which is a great way to prepare your skillset for the future and position yourself favorably for your next career move. As a People Analytics Specialist, you will have a full set of skills that help you take gut feeling out of HR decision-making and add essential strategic value to your organization.

### Are there any prerequisites?

No. No prior statistics or technical knowledge required.

### How do I get Power BI?

Power BI Desktop is a free application that you can install on your Windows computer. Mac users can run Power BI in a browser, but this version has limited functionality. We recommend using a Windows computer for the practical parts of the People Dashboards in Power BI course.

### What AI tools will I use in this program?

The program uses ChatGPT to demonstrate the AI workflows, but the principles apply to any generative AI tool with similar capabilities.

### Do you offer a money-back guarantee for certificate programs?

Yes! We pride ourselves on high-quality programs. That’s why we feel comfortable offering a 30-day money-back guarantee to ensure that you are 100% satisfied. If for any reason it’s not your thing, you can send us an email at [\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection) to request a full refund.

### Is this program eligible for recertification credits by SHRM, HRCI and others?

The Academy to Innovate HR (AIHR) is a trusted recertification partner of the world’s leading HR Associations, together representing over 1,000,000 HR professionals globally and offers HR programs eligible for recertification credits.

With AIHR, your learning hours count twice — once toward building in-demand HR skills, and again toward maintaining your existing credentials. 

This program is eligible for:

* **36** SHRM PDCs
* **36 HR (General)** Business HRCI Credits
* **40** HRPA PDCs

See the full list of HR associations offering credits for the **People Analytics Certificate Program**.

Plus, as a registered education provider on LinkedIn, AIHR makes it easy to showcase your new credentials directly on your profile, boosting your professional visibility.

### Is there a fixed schedule?

No. This program is 100% online and self-paced! When you learn and how much time you spend each day, week, or month is up to you. In total, you will need to invest approximately 35 hours to finish the program and obtain your certificate.

### How long do I have access to the program?

In total, you will have 12 months of access to the student portal, all lessons, and learning materials. On average, members complete their (first) program in 3 - 4 months.

### Which languages are the courses conducted in?

All courses are conducted in English with English subtitles available.

### Is this program the right fit for me?

If you’re not sure if this program is the right fit, we are here to help you determine which program is the right fit for your goals and needs! Simply talk to one of our admissions advisors or send them an email at [\](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection).
